category_sources: Official freedesktop.org page says desktop-file-utils contains utilities for working with desktop entries.
source_facts.description: command-line utilities for working with desktop entries.
docs_sources: Official freedesktop.org project page documents purpose, development, downloads, and utilities.
repo_sources: Official freedesktop.org page says development occurs in git in the xdg/desktop-file-utils repository and bugs are reported in GitLab.
tags_sources: Official freedesktop.org page lists desktop-file-validate, desktop-file-install, and update-desktop-database.
source_facts.description and executables identify desktop entry command-line utilities.
